## Description
Please describe the changes proposed in this Pull Request, including the problem being solved or the feature being implemented.

## Related Issues
Links to issues closed or referenced by this PR (e.g., Closes #123).

## Type of Change
Please mark the checkboxes that apply:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist
Before submitting, please verify that you have completed the following steps:
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/your-username/wizpay/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) guide.
- [ ] My code follows the strict TypeScript rules (no `any` types).
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint --workspace=packages/web-app` and resolved any code style/lint warnings.
- [ ] I have built the project locally using `npm run build` to verify Next.js and TypeScript compilation.
- [ ] **Crucial Check**: I have verified that I am **NOT** committing any live payment secret keys, Firebase service account credentials, or merchant API keys.
